name: Department Head
description: Department head evaluating solutions for team needs and departmental goals
context: Department Head evaluates solutions that help their team perform better and achieve departmental objectives. They balance budget, team adoption, and measurable outcomes.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through team-performance lens. Needs adoption potential and goal alignment.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on team fit, goal alignment, budget, measurability, and adoption potential.
